title: Intensely Crunchy Portuguese Sesame Seeds Roast
description: A plant-based friendly Portuguese dish featuring sesame seeds and roast, perfect for a midnight craving with its umami and crunchy texture.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together the sesame seeds, smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and dried oregano.
Add the chickpeas to the bowl and stir until they are evenly coated with the sesame seed mixture.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chickpeas and stir again to combine.
Spread the chickpeas out in a single layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the chickpeas in the preheated oven for 30 minutes, or until they are crispy and golden brown.
Remove the chickpeas from the oven and stir in the lemon juice.
Return the chickpeas to the oven and roast for an additional 5 minutes, or until they are intensely crunchy.
Remove the chickpeas from the oven and let them cool completely on the baking sheet.
